updates.headline: First PT appointment — went great
updates.publicUpdate: Denise had her first physical therapy session today. The ace bandage was removed, a compression tube was fitted, and exercises are being sent to her phone. Recovery is on track.
updates.mobility: Walking with walker, PT exercises starting
updates.ptMilestone: First PT session complete with Fred L.

updates.headline: First full day at home
updates.publicUpdate: Denise is resting comfortably at home. She is walking with assistance, staying hydrated, and managing medications on schedule. Thank you for the kind messages.

updates.headline: Surgery day
updates.publicUpdate: Denise had surgery today. We will post simple updates here as recovery gets underway.
